goal: Audit release readiness after DEV-021 and close documentation gaps for PostgreSQL runtime production cutover without production cutover.
summary: DEV-022 completed release gate / production cutover audit documentation and runtime-memory updates. It confirmed driver-backed PostgreSQL adapter readiness from code/tests/docs, aligned runbook/backlog/standards, and kept production cutover blocked pending external branch protection, required checks, environment protection, secret-store evidence, backup/restore drill, production smoke, rollback target and signoff. No production database connection, production write, production secret, deploy or cutover was performed.

json_parse.command: JSON parse for current_status, backlog and runtime run files

jsonl_parse.command: JSONL parse for runtime memory logs

release_gate_conclusion: Documentation, structured-data audit and full local gates are complete. Production PostgreSQL cutover remains blocked until external branch protection, environment approval, secret-store evidence, backup/restore drill, production smoke, rollback target and signoff are complete.
next_action: Open PR, run GitHub required checks, collect external branch/environment/secret/backup/smoke/signoff evidence, and do not cut over production until signed release window.
